republican.example: He holds republican views on government.
republican.example_zh: 他對政府抱持共和體制的觀點。

republican.example: Her uncle is a lifelong Republican.
republican.example_zh: 她叔叔一輩子都是共和黨人。

resemblance.example: There is a strong resemblance between them.

reservoir.example: The city gets water from a reservoir.
reservoir.example_zh: 這座城市的水來自水庫。

residence.example: This is the official residence of the mayor.

resident.example: Every resident of the building helped.
resident.example_zh: 這棟大樓的每位住戶都幫了忙。

residential.example: They live in a quiet residential area.
residential.example_zh: 他們住在一個安靜的住宅區。

resort.example: We stayed at a beach resort.
resort.example_zh: 我們住在一個海灘度假村。

respondent.example: Most respondents liked the new plan.
respondent.example_zh: 大多數受訪者喜歡這項新計畫。

resume.example: They resumed the game after the rain.
resume.example_zh: 雨停後他們重新開始比賽。

resume.example: She sent her resume to the company.
resume.example_zh: 她把履歷寄給了那家公司。

retail.example: She works in the retail business.

revenue.example: The shop's revenue grew last year.
revenue.example_zh: 這家店去年的營收成長了。

reverse.example: He reversed the car into the garage.
The truth was the reverse of what he said.
reverse.example_zh: 事實和他說的恰恰相反。

rhetoric.example: His speech was full of clever rhetoric.
rhetoric.example_zh: 他的演說充滿巧妙的修辭。

rib.example: He hurt a rib when he fell.
rib.example_zh: 他跌倒時傷到了一根肋骨。

ridge.example: We hiked along the mountain ridge.

rigid.example: The rules here are very rigid.

rim.example: She wiped the rim of the cup.

riot.example: A riot broke out in the city.

rip.example: He ripped the letter in half.
There is a rip in my jeans.

risky.example: Climbing without a rope is risky.

ritual.example: Lighting candles is part of the ritual.
ritual.example_zh: 點蠟燭是這個儀式的一部分。

rival.example: The two teams are old rivals.
Few singers can rival her voice.
rival.example_zh: 很少有歌手的嗓音比得上她。

rod.example: He fixed the curtain with a metal rod.
rod.example_zh: 他用一根金屬桿固定窗簾。

sacred.example: The mountain is sacred to the local people.
sacred.example_zh: 這座山對當地人來說是神聖的。

saddle.example: She climbed onto the horse's saddle.

saint.example: The church is named after a saint.
saint.example_zh: 這座教堂以一位聖人命名。

salmon.example: We had grilled salmon for dinner.

salon.example: She got her hair done at the salon.

sandal.example: She wore sandals to the beach.

scan.example: The doctor did a scan of his brain.
scan.example_zh: 醫生為他的腦部做了掃描。

scandal.example: The scandal shocked the whole town.
scandal.example_zh: 這樁醜聞震驚了整個城鎮。

scar.example: He has a small scar on his arm.

scenario.example: Imagine a scenario where you win.
scenario.example_zh: 想像一個你獲勝的情景。

scent.example: The dog followed the scent of the fox.
scent.example_zh: 狗循著狐狸的氣味追蹤。

scheme.example: They came up with a clever scheme.
scheme.example_zh: 他們想出了一個巧妙的方案。

scheme.example: They schemed to take over the company.
scheme.example_zh: 他們密謀奪取這家公司。

scope.example: The project is large in scope.

scramble.example: The kids scrambled up the hill.
scramble.example_zh: 孩子們手腳並用爬上山坡。

scrap.example: He saved scraps of paper for notes.
scrap.example_zh: 他留下碎紙片來做筆記。

script.example: The actors learned the script by heart.
script.example_zh: 演員們把劇本背得滾瓜爛熟。

sector.example: She works in the public sector.

seminar.example: She gave a seminar on writing.
seminar.example_zh: 她舉辦了一場寫作研討會。

senator.example: The senator voted for the new law.
senator.example_zh: 那位參議員投票支持這項新法律。

sensation.example: She felt a warm sensation in her hands.
sensation.example_zh: 她的手有一股溫暖的感覺。

sensation.zh: 轟動、轟動一時的人事物
sensation.example: The young singer became a sensation.
sensation.example_zh: 這位年輕歌手轟動一時。

sensitivity.example: He treats the topic with sensitivity.
sensitivity.example_zh: 他以體貼的態度處理這個話題。

sensor.example: The light has a motion sensor.

sentiment.example_zh: 這張卡片表達了溫暖的情感。

sentimental.example: She kept the letter for sentimental reasons.
sentimental.example_zh: 她出於情感因素留著那封信。

sequence.example: Follow the steps in the right sequence.
sequence.example_zh: 依照正確的順序進行步驟。

series.example: She is reading a series of fantasy books.
series.example_zh: 她正在讀一系列奇幻小說。

server.example: The website is hosted on a fast server.
server.example_zh: 這個網站架在一台快速的伺服器上。

session.example: We had a long practice session today.
session.example_zh: 我們今天練習了很長一段時間。

setting.example: The story's setting is a small village.
setting.example_zh: 這個故事的背景是一個小村莊。

shareholder.example: Each shareholder owns part of the company.
shareholder.example_zh: 每位股東都擁有公司的一部分。

shatter.example: The glass shattered on the floor.
shatter.example_zh: 玻璃在地上碎成一片片。

shed.example: He keeps his tools in a garden shed.
shed.example_zh: 他把工具放在花園的小棚屋裡。

sheer.example: It was sheer luck that we found it.
sheer.example_zh: 我們找到它純粹是運氣。

sheriff.example: The sheriff kept order in the town.
